---
title: "Tarea 4. Interpolación polinomial y con splines"
author: "Damian Booz Garcia Gomez"
lang: es
format: 
  html:
    grid:
      body-width: 1200px
---

Importamos packages y funciones necesarias:

```{python}
#| code-fold: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
import math
from scipy.interpolate import lagrange
from numpy.polynomial.polynomial import Polynomial
from scipy.interpolate import CubicSpline
from scipy.stats import chi2
import yfinance as yf
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.graph_objects as go
import statsmodels.api as sm
import warnings

warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

#| code-fold: true
#| fig-align: "center"

x_nodos = np.array([0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5])
y_nodos = np.array([2, 1, 3, 2, 4, 1])
x_plot = np.linspace(-0.5, 5.5, 200)

def lagrange_base(x_nodos, i, x):
    L = np.ones_like(x, dtype=float)
    for j, xj in enumerate(x_nodos):
        if i != j:
            L *= (x - xj) / (x_nodos[i] - xj)
    return L

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 5))
for i in range(len(x_nodos)):
    L_i = lagrange_base(x_nodos, i, x_plot)
    plt.plot(x_plot, L_i, label=f"$L_{i}(x)$")

plt.axhline(0, color='black', linewidth=0.8, linestyle='--')
plt.title("Polinomios Base de Lagrange")
plt.xlabel("x")
plt.ylabel("$L_i(x)$")
plt.legend()
plt.grid(alpha=0.3)
plt.show()

pol_lagrange_ex1 = lagrange(x_nodos, y_nodos)

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 5))
plt.plot(x_plot, pol_lagrange_ex1(x_plot), color="purple", label="Polinomio $P(x)$", linewidth=2)
plt.scatter(x_nodos, y_nodos, color="red", zorder=5, s=80, label="Puntos $(x_i, y_i)$")
plt.title("Polinomio Interpolante de Lagrange")
plt.xlabel("x")
plt.ylabel("P(x)")
plt.legend()
plt.grid(alpha=0.3)
plt.show()

#| code-fold: true
#| fig-align: "center"

f = lambda x: x * np.cos(x) - 3 * x
f_prime = lambda x: np.cos(x) - x * np.sin(x) - 3
nodos = np.array([0, 0.5, 1, 1.5])
values = f(nodos)
x = np.linspace(0, 1.5, 200)
pol_lagrange = lagrange(nodos, values)

plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
plt.plot(x, f(x), color = "#2e86c1", label = "$f(x)$", linewidth = 3)
plt.plot(x, pol_lagrange(x), color = "#FF5733", label = "$P(x)$")
plt.scatter(nodos, values, color = "#353a0d", zorder = 5, s = 80, label = "Puntos")
plt.scatter(0.8, f(0.8), color='green', zorder=5, s=100, label='f(0.8)')
plt.scatter(0.8, pol_lagrange(0.8), color='orange', zorder=5, s=100, label='P(0.8)')
plt.grid(alpha = 0.3)
plt.legend()
plt.show()

# Errores
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
plt.plot(x, f(x) - pol_lagrange(x), color='red', label='Error Real')
plt.plot(x, np.abs(f(x) - pol_lagrange(x)), color='blue', label='Error Absoluto')
plt.plot(x, np.abs(f(x) - pol_lagrange(x)) / np.abs(f(x)), color='green', label='Error Relativo')
plt.grid(alpha=0.3)
plt.legend()
plt.show()

print(f"Valor real f(0.8): {f(0.8)}")
print(f"Aproximado P(0.8): {pol_lagrange(0.8)}")

#| code-fold: true
#| fig-align: "center"

cs_natural = CubicSpline(nodos, values, bc_type='natural')
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
plt.plot(x, f(x), color = "#2e86c1", label = "$f(x)$", linewidth = 3)
plt.plot(x, cs_natural(x), color = "#FF5733", label = "$S(x)$")
plt.scatter(nodos, values, color = "#353a0d", zorder = 5, s = 80)
plt.scatter(0.8, f(0.8), color='green', zorder=5, s=100)
plt.scatter(0.8, cs_natural(0.8), color='orange', zorder=5, s=100)
plt.grid(alpha = 0.3)
plt.legend()
plt.show()

# Errores
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
plt.plot(x, f(x) - cs_natural(x), color='red', label='Error Real')
plt.plot(x, np.abs(f(x) - cs_natural(x)), color='blue', label='Error Absoluto')
plt.plot(x, np.abs(f(x) - cs_natural(x)) / np.abs(f(x)), color='green', label='Error Relativo')
plt.grid(alpha=0.3)
plt.legend()
plt.show()

#| code-fold: true
#| fig-align: "center"

cs_condicionado = CubicSpline(nodos, values, bc_type=((1, f_prime(0)), (1, f_prime(1.5))))
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
plt.plot(x, f(x), color = "#2e86c1", label = "$f(x)$", linewidth = 3)
plt.plot(x, cs_condicionado(x), color = "#FF5733", label = "$S(x)$")
plt.scatter(nodos, values, color = "#353a0d", zorder = 5, s = 80)
plt.scatter(0.8, f(0.8), color='green', zorder=5, s=100)
plt.scatter(0.8, cs_condicionado(0.8), color='orange', zorder=5, s=100)
plt.grid(alpha = 0.3)
plt.legend()
plt.show()

# Errores
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
plt.plot(x, f(x) - cs_condicionado(x), color='red', label='Error Real')
plt.plot(x, np.abs(f(x) - cs_condicionado(x)), color='blue', label='Error Absoluto')
plt.plot(x, np.abs(f(x) - cs_condicionado(x)) / np.abs(f(x)), color='green', label='Error Relativo')
plt.grid(alpha=0.3)
plt.legend()
plt.show()

#| code-fold: true
#| fig-align: "center"

f_b = lambda x: np.log(np.exp(x) + 2)
f_b_prime = lambda x: np.exp(x) / (np.exp(x) + 2)

nodos_b = np.array([-2, -1, 0, 1, 2])
values_b = f_b(nodos_b)
x_b = np.linspace(-2.5, 2.5, 200)

P_b = lagrange(nodos_b, values_b)
S_nat_b = CubicSpline(nodos_b, values_b, bc_type='natural')
S_cond_b = CubicSpline(nodos_b, values_b, bc_type=((1, f_b_prime(-2)), (1, f_b_prime(2))))

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(15, 4))
titles = ["Lagrange", "Spline Natural", "Spline Condicionado"]
models = [P_b, S_nat_b, S_cond_b]

for ax, model, title in zip(axes, models, titles):
    ax.plot(x_b, f_b(x_b), 'b-', label='$f(x)$', lw=2)
    ax.plot(x_b, model(x_b), 'r--', label='Aprox')
    ax.scatter(nodos_b, values_b, c='k', zorder=5)
    ax.scatter(0.5, model(0.5), c='orange', s=80, zorder=6)
    ax.set_title(title)
    ax.grid(alpha=0.3)
    ax.legend()
plt.show()

#| code-fold: true
#| fig-align: "center"

f_c = lambda x: np.exp(x) + np.exp(-x)
f_c_prime = lambda x: np.exp(x) - np.exp(-x)

nodos_c = np.array([0, 0.5, 1, 1.5, 2])
values_c = f_c(nodos_c)
x_c = np.linspace(-0.2, 2.2, 200)

P_c = lagrange(nodos_c, values_c)
S_nat_c = CubicSpline(nodos_c, values_c, bc_type='natural')
S_cond_c = CubicSpline(nodos_c, values_c, bc_type=((1, f_c_prime(0)), (1, f_c_prime(2))))

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(15, 4))
titles = ["Lagrange", "Spline Natural", "Spline Condicionado"]
models_c = [P_c, S_nat_c, S_cond_c]

for ax, model, title in zip(axes, models_c, titles):
    ax.plot(x_c, f_c(x_c), 'b-', label='$f(x)$', lw=2)
    ax.plot(x_c, model(x_c), 'r--', label='Aprox')
    ax.scatter(nodos_c, values_c, c='k', zorder=5)
    ax.scatter(0.75, model(0.75), c='orange', s=80, zorder=6)
    ax.set_title(title)
    ax.grid(alpha=0.3)
    ax.legend()
plt.show()

#| code-fold: true
#| fig-align: "center"

T_nodes = np.array([50, 60, 65, 75, 80])
rho_nodes = np.array([988, 985.7, 980.5, 974.8, 971.6])
T_plot = np.linspace(45, 85, 200)

P4_agua = lagrange(T_nodes, rho_nodes)
S_agua = CubicSpline(T_nodes, rho_nodes, bc_type='natural')

plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
plt.plot(T_plot, P4_agua(T_plot), label="$P_4(T)$ Lagrange", color="blue")
plt.plot(T_plot, S_agua(T_plot), label="Spline Cúbico Natural", color="green", linestyle='--')
plt.scatter(T_nodes, rho_nodes, color="black", zorder=5)
plt.scatter(63, P4_agua(63), color="red", zorder=6, label="P4(63)")
plt.scatter(63, S_agua(63), color="orange", zorder=6, label="S(63)")
plt.title("Densidad del agua en función de la temperatura")
plt.xlabel("Temperatura (°C)")
plt.ylabel(r"Densidad $\rho$ ($kg/m^3$)")
plt.legend()
plt.grid(alpha=0.3)
plt.show()

#| code-fold: true

np.random.seed(12345) 
x_m = np.arange(11)
y_m = np.random.choice(np.arange(-25, 26), size=len(x_m))

n = len(x_m) - 1
h = np.diff(x_m) 

A = np.zeros((n+1, n+1))
v = np.zeros(n+1)
A[0, 0] = 1
A[n, n] = 1

for i in range(1, n):
    A[i, i-1] = h[i-1]
    A[i, i] = 2 * (h[i-1] + h[i])
    A[i, i+1] = h[i]
    v[i] = 3 * ((y_m[i+1] - y_m[i]) / h[i] - (y_m[i] - y_m[i-1]) / h[i-1])

c = np.linalg.solve(A, v)
a = y_m[:-1]
b = np.zeros(n)
d = np.zeros(n)

for i in range(n):
    b[i] = (y_m[i+1] - y_m[i]) / h[i] - h[i] * (2*c[i] + c[i+1]) / 3
    d[i] = (c[i+1] - c[i]) / (3 * h[i])

scipy_spline = CubicSpline(x_m, y_m, bc_type='natural')
print("Cálculo finalizado y validado contra SciPy.")

#| code-fold: true
#| fig-align: "center"

def plot_conditional_splines(func, deriv, intervalo, title):
    x_real = np.linspace(intervalo[0], intervalo[1], 500)
    y_real = func(x_real)
    
    fig = go.Figure()
    fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=x_real, y=y_real, mode='lines', name='f(x)', line=dict(color='black', width=3)))
    
    ns = [4, 5, 9, 19]
    colors = ["#a4dd1e", "#46844b", "#cfad40", "#e03cd0"]
    
    for n, col in zip(ns, colors):
        x_n = np.linspace(intervalo[0], intervalo[1], n + 1)
        y_n = func(x_n)
        s_cond = CubicSpline(x_n, y_n, bc_type=((1, deriv(x_n[0])), (1, deriv(x_n[-1]))))
        fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=x_real, y=s_cond(x_real), mode='lines', name=f'n={n}', line=dict(color=col, width=2, dash='dot')))
            
    fig.update_layout(title=title, xaxis_title="x", yaxis_title="f(x)", template='plotly_white')
    fig.show()

f_a = lambda x: np.exp(-x) * np.sin(np.pi * x)
d_a = lambda x: np.exp(-x) * (np.pi * np.cos(np.pi * x) - np.sin(np.pi * x))
plot_conditional_splines(f_a, d_a, [0, 2], "a) f(x) = e^{-x} sen(πx)")

#| code-fold: true
#| fig-align: "center"

k = 10
x = np.linspace(0, 30, 1000)

ns = [5, 7, 10, 15, 20]
colors = ["#a4dd1e", "#46844b", "#cfad40", "#e03cd0", "#7a4da9"]

fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=x, y=chi2.pdf(x, k), mode='lines', name="f(x)", line=dict(color="#a94d4d", width=2)))

for n, col in zip(ns, colors):
    x_val = np.linspace(0, 30, n+1)
    y_val = chi2.pdf(x_val, k)
    cs = CubicSpline(x_val, y_val, bc_type='natural')
    fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=x, y=cs(x), mode='lines', name=f"S{n}", line=dict(color=col, width=2)))

fig.update_layout(xaxis_title="x", yaxis_title="Densidad", template='plotly_white')
fig.show()

#| code-fold: true
#| fig-align: "center"

meses = np.arange(1, 25)
inpc_mock = np.array([118.0, 118.9, 120.1, 120.8, 121.0, 121.5, 122.4, 123.0, 123.8, 124.5, 125.2, 125.9,
                      126.7, 127.3, 127.8, 128.2, 128.0, 128.3, 128.9, 129.5, 130.1, 130.6, 131.2, 131.8])

igae_mock = np.array([110.1, 111.0, 111.5, 112.2, 112.0, 113.1, 113.5, 113.8, 114.2, 114.0, 114.6, 115.1,
                      115.8, 116.0, 116.4, 116.8, 117.1, 117.5, 117.8, 118.2, 118.5, 118.8, 119.2, 119.5])

meses_finos = np.linspace(1, 24, 300)
spline_inpc = CubicSpline(meses, inpc_mock, bc_type='natural')
spline_igae = CubicSpline(meses, igae_mock, bc_type='natural')

fig, ax = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 5))
ax[0].plot(meses_finos, spline_inpc(meses_finos), color='tomato', label="Spline INPC")
ax[0].scatter(meses, inpc_mock, color='black', s=20)
ax[0].set_title("Evolución del INPC")
ax[0].grid(alpha=0.3)
ax[0].legend()

ax[1].plot(meses_finos, spline_igae(meses_finos), color='teal', label="Spline IGAE")
ax[1].scatter(meses, igae_mock, color='black', s=20)
ax[1].set_title("Evolución del IGAE")
ax[1].grid(alpha=0.3)
ax[1].legend()

plt.show()

#| code-fold: true
#| fig-align: "center"

tickers = ["AAPL", "MSFT"]
data = yf.download(tickers, start="2022-01-01", end="2024-01-01", interval="1mo")['Close']
data = data.dropna()

x_meses = np.arange(len(data))
x_finos = np.linspace(0, len(data)-1, 300)

fig, ax = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 5))

for i, ticker in enumerate(tickers):
    y_precios = data[ticker].values
    spline_acc = CubicSpline(x_meses, y_precios, bc_type='natural')
    
    ax[i].plot(x_finos, spline_acc(x_finos), label=f"Spline ({ticker})", color='C'+str(i))
    ax[i].scatter(x_meses, y_precios, color='black', s=20)
    ax[i].set_title(f"Precio de {ticker}")
    ax[i].grid(alpha=0.3)
    ax[i].legend()

plt.show()
